Hey, what's going on everybody? So right now we are going to go over the Accountability Challenge Agile Campaign. Alright, so to begin, the first thing that you want to do is as soon as you finish up importing the campaign, you want to just name it right here, I already had it, but just show you, Accountability Challenge, Save Campaign. And then once it is saved, you want to close this and come in and change the dates for these. Now they're all going to be different, of course by the time you actually download this. So 14 days before the event. This is how you time it up. Let's say that you wanted to do this event. Today is the 9th, let's say we wanted to do the 23rd, so we would put the 9th for the date that this message is going out, or this email. And then set the time you wanted to go out and then choose your time zone. Other than that, you don't need anything here, so use this quick Save and then save the campaign right there. Now once you've done that, run through, do the same thing for this one, it will show you this message. Oops, the same thing for this one, 10 days before, and then change this to 10 days before. So we're having our event on the 23rd, for example, then 10 days before that would be the 13th. We'll save that, and then of course edit the time zone and edit the time. So let's go back here and do that. Edit the time zone, choose your time zone, and then select what time you want that to go out. And then save the campaign again. So it's basically the same thing for each one of these nodes, 4 days before, 7 days before, 3 days before, and then Friday morning. So once you have those nodes changed, you can move on to the emails. There are a total of 5 emails in this, and each one of them basically highlights the same things. So you're going to want to put your gym name here, and then over in HTML, don't put anything in here because this doesn't do anything. In HTML, you want to click select the template, load from editor, you'll get this little popup right here, and then first thing you do, just like all the other campaigns, you're going to want to erase this, and then insert slash edit image, click browse, choose the file, and then select whatever your logo is, and that should be that. So I don't have a picture to use in this case, but easy enough. And then you want to basically read through this, and if there are any things that you want to change, go ahead and change them, but I would recommend keeping the message the same, just go through and change the highlighted things. So of course read through it, just understand so you know what's being sent to your members. But as far as what you have to change, I've basically highlighted it in the email, and then right here is the obvious stuff, like you want to change this, type out your coach name, their position, the number, the email they could reach you at, and then to change this, you don't even have to delete it. All you have to do is right click, insert edit image, browse, choose file, and then once you select the proper image that you want to use, it'll actually just replace the one that's already there, and then you would click upload, and then you would click OK, and then the image would pop up. After you're done with that, you just want to select right click on there, click the link, insert your Instagram link in there, and then same thing for the Facebook, you're going to want to right click this, click the link, insert your Facebook page there, your Facebook page link, rather, and then you want to click save. And once we're done, click save, save again, and then save right up here. So yes, you will have to click save campaign after every change you make. That's just how agile works. Sometimes I've seen in my function where if you don't click this big purple save button, it actually won't save all the changes.
